name: Nubank Brazilian Neobank and Open Finance API
what_it_does: Nubank Brazilian neobank and open finance REST API for Brazilian fintech developers and financial service partners to access Nubank's open finance data sharing, integrate financial products, and build on Brazil's Open Finance ecosystem — enabling account data portability, credit information sharing, and financial product cross-selling through Nubank's open finance participation under Banco Central do Brasil's Open Finance framework. Enables AI agents to manage account data sharing for Open Finance API access automation, handle credit information for lending data portability automation, access consent management for BACEN Open Finance automation, retrieve financial profile for customer creditworthiness automation, manage product integration for Nubank partner API automation, handle data portability for regulatory compliance automation, access investment data for portfolio sharing automation, retrieve insurance data for product integration automation, manage payment initiation for Open Finance PIX automation, and integrate Nubank data with financial planning, lending, and advisory platforms for Open Finance ecosystem automation.
use_cases: Accessing Nubank customer financial data through Brazil's Open Finance framework for fintech automation agents
Receiving consented Nubank account and transaction data for credit scoring and lending automation agents
Integrating with Nubank's Open Finance participation for financial product cross-selling automation agents
Consuming Nubank investment and insurance data via Open Finance APIs for advisory automation agents
not_for: Direct Nubank account management (Nubank does not offer a general-purpose management API for merchants)
Consumer product integration outside Open Finance (Nubank's API is Open Finance framework-focused)
Non-Brazilian markets (Nubank's API focuses on Brazilian Open Finance regulatory framework)
best_when: A Brazilian fintech, lender, or financial services platform wanting AI agents to access consented Nubank customer financial data through Brazil's Open Finance framework for credit analysis, financial planning, or product personalization.
avoid_when: OPEN FINANCE CONSENT IS MANDATORY: All Nubank data access requires explicit customer consent through BACEN Open Finance consent flow; automated data access without consent creates regulatory violation; automated must implement full BACEN Open Finance consent flow. NUBANK IS NOT A GENERAL-PURPOSE API: Nubank's API exposure is limited to Open Finance regulatory requirements; automated assumption of comprehensive merchant API creates no available endpoints; automated should understand Nubank's API scope is Open Finance data sharing, not merchant payment processing. BACEN OPEN FINANCE PARTICIPANT CERTIFICATION: Accessing Open Finance data requires BACEN-certified institution status; automated self-service API access assumption creates unauthorized access; automated must be BACEN-certified Open Finance participant. DATA PORTABILITY HAS FRESHNESS WINDOW: Open Finance data has defined refresh intervals; automated real-time data assumption creates stale data from last sync; automated must handle data staleness and implement refresh requests.

auth.notes: Nubank uses BACEN Open Finance OAuth 2.0 with FAPI (Financial API) security profile for consented data access. REST API with JSON. São Paulo, Brazil HQ. Founded 2013 by David Vélez, Cristina Junqueira, and Edward Wible. NYSE:NU. Products: Credit card, digital account, loans, investments, insurance (NuSeguros), NuCripto. Open Finance participant under BACEN. 100M+ customers globally (Brazil, Mexico, Colombia). Market cap ~$60B. BACEN regulated. LGPD. World's largest neobank. Competes with Banco Inter for Brazilian digital banking.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Open Finance sandbox for BACEN-certified institutions; production requires BACEN certification
pricing.paid_tiers: Open Finance data access is regulatory framework (no direct Nubank API pricing); BACEN infrastructure costs
pricing.notes: São Paulo BR. NYSE:NU. BACEN Open Finance framework. Regulatory data sharing, not commercial API. 100M+ users.

performance.rate_limits: BACEN Open Finance rate limits per certified institution; data refresh intervals regulated

known_agent_gotchas: BACEN OPEN FINANCE CERTIFICATION REQUIRED: Accessing Nubank Open Finance data requires BACEN-certified institution status and Open Finance participant enrollment; automated self-service API key assumption creates no access; automated must achieve BACEN Open Finance certification before data access

FAPI SECURITY PROFILE IS COMPLEX: Brazil Open Finance uses FAPI (Financial API) security profile with mTLS and signed JWTs; automated standard OAuth2 bearer token assumption creates authentication failure; automated must implement FAPI-compliant client with mTLS certificate and JWT signing

CUSTOMER CONSENT IS MANDATORY AND REVOCABLE: Open Finance consent requires active customer consent with full disclosure; automated permanent consent assumption creates revoked_consent on customer withdrawal; automated must implement consent lifecycle management and honor revocations immediately

DATA IS NUBANK-SHARED NOT MERCHANT-REQUESTED: Nubank's API is about Open Finance data sharing (BACEN mandate), not a commercial merchant payment API; automated payment initiation via Nubank Open Finance assumption creates wrong product expectation; automated should use PIX or traditional merchant acquiring for payment processing

OPEN FINANCE DATA HAS DEFINED REFRESH: BACEN Open Finance data is refreshed on defined schedules; automated real-time data expectation creates stale data; automated must implement refresh request flow and communicate data freshness to end users
agent_readiness.security_notes: Brazilian Open Finance (regulatory). BACEN, LGPD, FAPI. OAuth2 + mTLS + JWT. Brazil. Customer financial data. Highest regulatory security standard.

security_score_components.security_notes: Brazilian Open Finance. BACEN, LGPD, FAPI. OAuth2+mTLS+JWT. Brazil. Customer financial data. Regulatory maximum security.
